propaganda_campaign.text: State media proposes a $45M propaganda campaign to boost your image. Authorize it?
propaganda_campaign.accept: The campaign floods the airwaves. Citizens grow weary, but your image is polished.
propaganda_campaign.reject: You declined the campaign. The media looks elsewhere for stories.

silence_journalist.text: An investigative journalist is about to publish a damaging exposé. Have them silenced?
silence_journalist.accept: The story never runs. Your secrets are safe, but whispers spread in the shadows.
silence_journalist.reject: You let the press run its course. Some stories are better faced head-on.
silence_journalist.risk: The exposé publishes, triggering a wave of public outrage!

protest_response.text: Protests are erupting in the capital. Deploy security forces to disperse them?
protest_response.accept: The streets are cleared. Order is restored, but scars remain in public memory.
protest_response.reject: You show restraint. The protests eventually wind down on their own.

remove_rival.text: A shadowy operative offers to permanently remove a political rival for $80M. Authorize it?
remove_rival.accept: The rival disappears quietly. The generals nod approvingly.
remove_rival.reject: You decline. Some problems are better left to time.
remove_rival.risk: The operation is traced back to you! International condemnation follows.

buy_loyalty.text: A high-ranking officer is planning to defect to the opposition. Buy their loyalty for $50M?
buy_loyalty.accept: You secure their loyalty. They become one of your most devoted commanders.
buy_loyalty.reject: You let them go. Perhaps they will cause no trouble.
buy_loyalty.risk: The defector leaks your military strategies to your enemies!
